proposal.working_title: AI Use Cases for Small Business Operations: 12 High-ROI Plays Owners Can Ship in 30 Days
proposal.one_line_angle: A ranked, payback-ordered field guide of operational AI use cases that small and midmarket teams can actually ship in 30 days, drawn from real engagements instead of enterprise white papers.
outline_bullets: The 12 highest-ROI AI use cases for small business operations, ranked by 30/60/90-day payback
A 5-question gate for evaluating any AI use case before you spend a dollar
Build vs buy vs outsource: a decision tree for shipping each use case without a 12-month roadmap
